evals.prompt: We checked Codex and Kimi docs for skill discovery while adding a repo skill. Save the docs evidence so the next agent doesn't have to look it up again.
evals.expected_output: Creates or updates a compact official-docs cache note with provider, topic, checked date, source URLs, supported claims, freshness, and used_by metadata.

evals.prompt: Before we update marketplace instructions again, see whether we already cached the official docs citation from last week and refresh it if stale.
evals.expected_output: Checks the cache index, applies freshness rules, refreshes official docs only when needed, and reports the reused or updated note.

evals.prompt: The docs did not actually say .codex/skills is auto-scanned. Cache that negative finding so we stop overclaiming it.
evals.expected_output: Records a negative official-docs finding with sources, scope, and a warning not to assert unsupported discovery behavior.
